markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on GTM initiatives, refine processes, and unblock key projects.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Community Launch Simplified:** The launch is now a phased rollout, starting with the base Circle community, to accelerate shipping. The Masterclass and Collective will follow.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [**YouTube Strategy Overhaul:** The channel will split into two: a "repository" for long-form content (podcasts, webinars) and an "organic" channel for short, high-cadence videos. This prevents algorithm signals from being diluted by low-retention content.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
  - [**Immediate Hiring Needs:** Two roles are open: a Community Lead to own member experience (Fannie joins Nov 17 for content) and a Director of Marketing for B2B demand gen.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [**Understory Campaigns Unblocked:** To prevent contacting VIPs, Jason will provide a HubSpot exclusion list by tomorrow. Gloria will draft the Lovable co-marketing campaign copy for review before her vacation.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=2416.0)

## Topics

### Process & KPIs

  - [**Meeting Cadence:** Friday syncs are now for "brain dumps" and flagging blockers; this meeting is for reviewing updates and making decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [**KPIs:** Focus is on pipeline and revenue, with supporting metrics for events (registrations), community (ALG members), and content (impressions).](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)

### Community Launch & Hiring

  - [**Launch Strategy:** A phased rollout, per Marcel's advice, to avoid overcomplication and ship faster.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
      - [**Phase 1:** Base Circle community (homepage, cleanup).](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
      - [**Phase 2:** Masterclass or Collective (copy is the only blocker).](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [**Hiring:**](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [**Community Lead:** To own member experience. Fannie joins Nov 17 to drive content (e.g., Masterclass structure).](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [**Director of Marketing:** Generalist with B2B demand gen expertise to own marketing channels for events, community, and products.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

### YouTube Strategy Overhaul

  - [**Problem:** The current channel, a mix of podcasts, webinars, and short-form videos, sends mixed signals to the YouTube algorithm, hurting organic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
  - [**Solution:** Split the channel into two distinct entities.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=2165.0)
      - [**Repository Channel:** For long-form content (podcasts, webinars).](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=1982.0)
      - [**Organic Channel:** For short, high-cadence videos optimized for discovery.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=1982.0)
  - [**New Production Framework:**](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
    1.  [**Title:** Start here; it's the foundation.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
    2.  [**Thumbnail:** Must be an accurate representation of the content.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
    3.  [**First 30 Seconds:** Crucial for audience retention.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [**ICP Definition:** A formal ICP document is needed to guide content strategy. Will will draft profiles for two segments:](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=3098.0)
      - [**Executives:** C-suite, founders (e.g., VIP dinners).](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=3173.0)
      - [**Operators:** Marketing directors, managers (e.g., webinars).](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=3173.0)

### Events & Co-Marketing

  - [**Lovable Co-Marketing Campaign:**](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Campaign copy is unrefined, but Gloria needs to start before vacation.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
      - [**Decision:** Gloria will draft copy based on the "co-built this business, now what?" theme. Jason will review it before Understory sends cold emails.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This unblocks low-risk cold email campaigns while the high-intent Luma blast awaits final copy.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [**VIP Dinner:**](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
      - [**Conflict:** The Nov 20 date clashes with Marcel's schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
      - [**Action:** Gloria will float the week to VIPs to find a new date.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
      - [**Guest List:** Jason will provide a list of founders/community members to invite.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)

### Marketing Operations

  - [**Understory Exclusion List:**](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=2471.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Understory is paused from sending campaigns to avoid contacting VIPs.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=2471.0)
      - [**Action:** Jason will provide a CSV of contacts to exclude by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=2620.0)
  - [**Clay AI Credit Usage:**](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=2895.0)
      - [**Finding:** The "Surge event table" is the main cost driver due to its 6 AI agents.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=2895.0)
      - [**Action:** Jason will check the OpenAI account to verify token usage and cost.](https://fathom.video/share/j2GQ68CbnZBrxat7BVPSrNR-2sZ4_eR1?tab=summary&timestamp=2934.0)
